items.rule: That's great. I'm so happy you got rid of the rotten egg smell. Use them once a month and it won't return.
I am sorry I am not sure the question. Please send us the qustion and I am happy to answer.
Keep the tone loose, natural, and low-pressure.
Skip salesy closers or support-funnel language.
Keep Facebook replies concise and easy to scan.

Start with how you agree that they could clean the fabric softener dispenser at the top of the agitator but then they could also use our product to clean the internal workings of their washing machine where you cannot see, like the pipes, filters, and pumps.
Use the website product page instead of Amazon for this reply.
We alwasy want to point to our own website.
Enjoy your fresh cup of coffee.
This is a cleaner tablet and can be used in any coffee machine.
Lead with the answer before extra context.
Avoid hypey claims and keep the reply grounded.

history.revisedResponse: Yes — it is meant for machines that can run a normal cleaning or descale cycle.

history.revisedResponse: Yes — it can help with buildup on many older Keurig-style machines too, and bitter taste is often a sign it’s time for a cleaning cycle. If you want, I can point you to the quick directions so you can check your exact machine.
